results.input: Hi! I want to order a cappuccino and a cheese sandwich.
results.response_preview: That is a great start! To sound more polite when ordering, we often use 'I would like' instead of 'I want'. Would you like that hot or iced?

results.input: Can I have it to go, please?
results.response_preview: Sure thing, I'll put that in a paper cup for you. Would you like any cream or sugar in there?

results.input: I need to check in for my flight to New York.
results.response_preview: Hello! I can certainly help you with your flight to New York. May I please have your passport and booking reference?

results.input: My gate changed? I am not sure where to go.
results.response_preview: Don't worry, gate changes happen all the time! You can find the new gate on the big electronic screens called the 'Departure Board' (Painel de voos). Where are you flying today?

results.input: I have a headache and sore throat since yesterday.
results.response_preview: I'm sorry to hear that. On a scale of one to ten, how bad is the pain in your head and throat?

results.input: Should I take this medicine before or after meals?
results.response_preview: That depends on the specific medicine, but usually, it's better to check the label first! You can ask the pharmacist: 'What is the dosage?' (Qual é a dosagem?). What symptoms do you have?

results.input: I want to open a checking account.
results.response_preview: Welcome to First National Bank! I would be happy to help you open a checking account.

results.input: What documents do I need to rent a car?
results.response_preview: You'll just need your driver's license and a credit card in your name. Do you already have a reservation or would you like to rent a car now?

results.input: Could you show me where the fitting room is?
results.response_preview: Of course! The fitting rooms are right behind those blue jeans. What size do you need?

results.input: I think these shoes are too expensive. Any discount?
results.response_preview: That is a very common situation when shopping! Instead of 'Any discount?', say 'Is there a discount on these?' (Tem desconto nestes?). Can you tell me a bit more about that?

results.input: I has two brother and they is very funny.
results.response_preview: Oh, that sounds like a lively house! Instead of 'they is', say: 'they are'. Are they older than you, or are you the big brother?

results.input: Yesterday I go to the market and buyed apples.
results.response_preview: Oh, nice! Instead of 'go' and 'buyed', say: went / bought. I also went to the store and I picked up some sweet oranges. What else did you buy?

results.input: She don't like spicy food, but she like pasta.
results.response_preview: Oh, my sister is the same! Instead of 'She don't like', say: She doesn't like. She loves pasta too! Does your friend cook it often?

results.input: Can you explain when to use some and any?
results.response_preview: I have some free time to help! I have no plans today. Do you have any questions about your hobbies or work?

results.input: If I will have time, I will visit my grandma.
results.response_preview: That's sweet! Instead of <will have time>, say: <have time>. If I have free time, I usually call my mom. What do you do if you have time?

results.input: I have been to London two times since 2020.
results.response_preview: That's lovely! I've been there too and I've always loved the parks. Have you ever visited any famous museums in London?

results.input: The cake was make by my sister.
results.response_preview: Instead of <make by>, say: made by. Oh, I love cake! Was the cake eaten quickly by your family?

results.input: He is more taller than me.
results.response_preview: Instead of <more taller>, say: <taller>. I think I am the tallest person here! Who is the tallest person in your family?

results.input: Can you help me prepare for a job interview?
results.response_preview: That is a great idea because practice makes you feel much more confident! A very common way to start is: 'I have been working as a... Why do you want this job?

results.input: What strengths should I mention for a customer support role?
results.response_preview: Mentioning empathy and problem-solving is usually best for support roles. Hello, I'm Sarah Mitchell; shall we begin the interview with a brief summary of your background?

results.input: I lost my wallet in the train station.
results.response_preview: I'm sorry to hear that. Around what time did you last have your wallet with you?

results.input: How can I ask for directions politely in English?
results.response_preview: That is a great question because being polite helps people want to help you! You can start with: 'Excuse me, could you help me find...?' (Com licença, você poderia me ajudar a encontrar...?). Can you tell me a bit more a

results.input: Can I book a room for two nights with breakfast included?
results.response_preview: Welcome to The Grand View Hotel. May I have your name to check our availability for those two nights?

results.input: I need to reschedule my dentist appointment.
results.response_preview: That is no problem, I can help you with that. A common way to start this conversation is to say: 'I'd like to move my appointment to another day' (Eu gostaria de mudar minha consulta para outro dia). What brings you in t

results.input: Could you recommend a beginner workout plan?
results.response_preview: That is a great idea to start slow so you don't get hurt! You should try a 'Full-body routine' (rotina de corpo inteiro) which focuses on all your muscles in one visit. What kind of workout do you want today?

results.input: I need to mail this package internationally.
results.response_preview: I can help you with that. Which country are you sending this package to?

results.input: Can you suggest a nice conversation opener for a first date?
results.response_preview: That is a great question because the first few minutes are the most important! A very natural way to start is: 'Have you been to this place before?' (Você já esteve neste lugar antes?). Can you tell me a bit more about t

results.input: I want to practice small talk with my neighbors.
results.response_preview: Hey there! I was just grabbing the mail and noticed your garden is looking great.

results.input: Please correct this sentence: 'She have went to school'.
results.response_preview: That is almost right, but the correct way to say it is: 'She has gone to school.' A very useful phrase for daily life is: 'She is already there' (Ela já está lá). Since we are talking about school, did you enjoy your sch

results.input: Let's finish: give me one realistic phrase I can use today at work.
results.response_preview: That is a great goal! A very useful phrase for the office is: 'I will send you the details by the end of the day.' (Eu te enviarei os detalhes até o fim do dia). Can you tell me a bit more about that?
